クラス BuffManager

java.lang.Object
simulation.runtime.BuffManager
public class BuffManager extends Object
Owns simulator-managed team buffs, field buffs, and buff collection rules.

This extracts buff storage and applicable-buff assembly from CombatSimulator so the simulator can delegate buff policy rather than embedding it directly.

  • フィールドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ

    fieldBuffs

    teamBuffs

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    void
    applyFieldBuff(Buff buff)
    Adds a field-only buff that applies only to the active character.
    void
    applyTeamBuff(Buff buff)
    Adds a team-wide buff.
    void
    applyTeamBuffNoStack(Buff buff)
    Adds a team-wide buff after removing any existing team buff with the same logical id.
    List<Buff>
    getActiveCharacterBuffs()
    Returns all buffs currently applicable to the active character.
    List<Buff>
    getApplicableBuffs(Character character)
    Collects all buffs currently applicable to the given character.
    List<Buff>
    getTeamBuffList()
    Returns the live simulator-owned team-buff list for package-local collaborators.
    void
    removeTeamBuffsById(BuffId buffId)
    Removes all simulator-owned team buffs with the given logical id.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • BuffManager

      public BuffManager(CombatSimulator sim)
      Creates a buff manager bound to the given simulator.
      パラメータ:
      sim - active simulator whose party and active-character state are consulted

  • メソッドの詳細

    • applyTeamBuff

      public void applyTeamBuff(Buff buff)
      Adds a team-wide buff.
      パラメータ:
      buff - buff to add

    • applyTeamBuffNoStack

      public void applyTeamBuffNoStack(Buff buff)
      Adds a team-wide buff after removing any existing team buff with the same logical id.

      This path is reserved for typed simulator buffs. Display labels are not used for no-stack replacement.

      パラメータ:
      buff - buff to add without stacking duplicate ids

    • applyFieldBuff

      public void applyFieldBuff(Buff buff)
      Adds a field-only buff that applies only to the active character.
      パラメータ:
      buff - field buff to add

    • getApplicableBuffs

      public List<Buff> getApplicableBuffs(Character character)
      Collects all buffs currently applicable to the given character.

      Sources aggregated are simulator-owned team buffs, weapon-provided team buffs, character-provided team buffs, and active-character-only field buffs.

      パラメータ:
      character - character whose applicable buffs are being queried
      戻り値:
      collected buff list

    • getActiveCharacterBuffs

      public List<Buff> getActiveCharacterBuffs()
      Returns all buffs currently applicable to the active character.
      戻り値:
      active character buff list

    • getTeamBuffList

      public List<Buff> getTeamBuffList()
      Returns the live simulator-owned team-buff list for package-local collaborators.
      戻り値:
      mutable team-buff list

    • removeTeamBuffsById

      public void removeTeamBuffsById(BuffId buffId)
      Removes all simulator-owned team buffs with the given logical id.
      パラメータ:
      buffId - buff id to remove
